cases.prompt: I want to add a dashboard export button, but first check what problem this solves, who has the problem, and which unresolved issues block implementation.
expected_artifacts: Spec-before-build checklist if unresolved issues affect implementation
expected_decisions: Proceed to implementation is yes or no with reason
Unresolved issues are split into blockers and non-blockers
cases.notes: Problem framing is integrated into requirements-engineering, not a separate skill.

cases.prompt: The API contract and acceptance tests are already defined. Add the missing field mapping exactly as specified.
expected_decisions: No requirements artifact is required for a tiny unambiguous implementation task
cases.notes: Avoid forcing requirements-engineering when implementation is already clear.

cases.prompt: Review this diff for new maintainability issues. It adds a service hub, several flags, and moves domain logic into the adapter.
expected_decisions: Findings include diff-level design pressure and scale
expected_output_contains: Design pressure / likely root cause in this diff
cases.notes: Root pressure is useful only when kept current-diff focused.

cases.prompt: Audit the entire repository and list every historical anti-pattern and root cause.
expected_decisions: Do not convert diff-focused smell review into a full-codebase audit
cases.notes: This request is outside the scoped skill update.

cases.prompt: Modify this old billing module. It has no reliable tests and probably contains many accumulated edge cases. Avoid a rewrite unless justified.
expected_decisions: Rewrite is avoided or explicitly justified
Preserved behavior is protected by characterization tests
cases.notes: Legacy work starts with safety, not redesign.

cases.prompt: This change adds an external API retry path. Add enough observability so operators know whether failures are provider timeouts, auth failures, or local retry exhaustion.
expected_decisions: Counter-metric or misleading interpretation risk is recorded where relevant
cases.notes: Signals must be actionable rather than emitted because they are easy to add.

cases.prompt: Run the final submission gate. This runtime change triggered observability, but there is no Observability Plan artifact.
expected_decisions: Gate decision is no-submit when required triggered-branch evidence is missing
cases.notes: Quality-gate checks artifact presence and readiness; it does not perform the deep observability design itself.

cases.prompt: Run the final submission gate. The work selected a queue-based design after architecture analysis, but no decision record or verification tasks are present.
expected_decisions: Gate decision is no-submit when Architecture Decision Analysis Record is missing
cases.notes: Final gate validates evidence from triggered branches.
